channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: War of the Visions: Final Fantasy Brave Exvius to end service on May 28 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

One year after the global version ended service.

The Japanese version of War of the Visions: Final Fantasy Brave Exvius will end service on May 28, publisher Square Enix and developer gumi announced.

War of the Visions: Final Fantasy Brave Exvius first launched for iOS and Android on November 14, 2019 in Japan, followed by March 25, 2020 worldwide. The global version ended service on May 30, 2025.

In a note from the development team, producer Watanabe said an “offline version” of the game was considered to preserve the experience, but was deemed too difficult to properly recreate because it relies heavily on online battles, guild content, and player interaction. However, Square Enix is actively preparing special videos to revisit the story, as well as a memorial book.

In-game events will continue be updated until the end of service. A special website for the game’s grand finale roadmap is available here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/war-of-the-visions-final-fantasy-brave-exvius-to-end-service-on-may-28-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: RPG Maker New Project announced
item.content:encoded:
Gotcha Gotcha Games has released a teaser trailer for a new entry in the role-playing game creation software RPG Maker.

The teaser shows the series’ traditional 2D-style role-playing game creation evolve into a newer, “HD-2D“-style creation akin to games like Octopath Traveler, Dragon Quest I & II HD-2D Remake, and Dragon Quest III HD-2D Remake.

Twitter accounts for the new project were also launched in English and Japanese.

Watch the teaser trailer below.

Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/rpg-maker-new-project-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cotton Rock With You launches August 6 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• Arcade
  • PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

Cotton goes to Japan.

Shoot ’em up game Cotton Rock With You will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, and PC via Steam on August 6 in Japan for 6,380 yen, SUCCESS Corporation announced. It will support English, Japanese, Korean, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, French, Spanish, and Portuguese language options. An arcade version will also be available.

The PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 versions will be available both physically and digitally. A limited edition will also be available for 11,880 yen, which includes a main character acrylic stand set, the original soundtrack CD, and an art book.

Here are the latest details:

The Original Cute ‘Em Up Series Cotton‘s 35th Anniversary Title

Cotton is the original cute ’em up series, which will celebrate its 35th anniversary in 2026. This entry is the sequel to Cotton Fantasy, which launched to critical acclaim as the series’ 30th anniversary title in 2021.

Cotton is Now Set in… Japan?

In search of the Willow candy scattered across the world, the sweets-loving and gluttonous witch Nata de Cotton leaps out of her magical kingdom and heads to… Japan!? A new adventure begins.

Exhilarating Gameplay Systems Return with 10 Playable Characters

In addition to the eight characters from Cotton Fantasy, two new characters join the fray as guests. The protagonist Cotton is even playable in an elegant oiran outfit. The guest characters are Izuna, the beautiful girl (?) ninja from Izuna: Legend of the Unemployed Ninja, and Psyva Ria, a character based on the player aircraft from Psyvariar 3. There are 16 total stages, including six selectable main stages, as well as bonus and final stages.

The gameplay systems from Cotton Fantasy return, and each character’s unique attacks are exhilarating as ever. The fully voiced adventure segments offer even more volume than the previous game.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/cotton-rock-with-you-launches-august-6-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Good Smile Company and Frontwing announce visual novel COCORO for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Good Smile Company and developer Frontwing have announced COCORO, a new visual novel game led by ATRI: My Dear Moments writer Konno Asta. It will launch for PC via Steam, DLsite, and other storefronts in 2026 with support for English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options.

The game’s staff includes:

  • Planning and Scenario: Konno Asta (known for ATRI: My Dear Moments)
  • Character Design: Akio Watanabe (known for the anime series Monogatari)
  • SD Artwork: Mai Nanaka (known for Innocent Girl and Pure Girl)
  • Backgrounds: Yyish  (known for ATRI: My Dear Moments)
  • Music: Matsumoto Fuminori (known for Wonderful Everyday: Diskontinuierliches Dasein)
  • Voice Cast:
    • COCORO (voiced by Hina Youmiya)

Watch the announcement trailer below. Follow the game’s official Twitter account here.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/good-smile-company-and-frontwing-announce-visual-novel-cocoro-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ‘Hotel management simulation x romance visual novel’ Yog-Sothoth’s Yard coming to Switch on July 23
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Currently available for PC.

Publisher Shochiku, and publisher and developer Bone Nail will release “hotel management simulation x romance visual novel” game Yog-Sothoth’s Yard for Switch on July 23, the companies announced.

Yog-Sothoth’s Yard first launched for PC via Steam on October 20, 2023. It supports English, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options, and will add Japanese language support alongside its Switch release.

In Japan, Shochiku will release the game both physically and digitally. The physical standard edition will be priced at 2,970 yen, while a limited edition will also be available for 4,400 yen. The latter includes a special box, retro room keychain, four character frame, and a specially illustrated reversible cover. The standard edition will also include the reversible cover.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Welcome to the yard!

In this game, you inherit an ancient villa burdened with shadowy debts. You’ll manage a hotel and hire diverse staff members including Death, a dragon, a Spirit Hunter, and a bioroid maid. Enigmatic guests will arrive, each bringing their own mysterious events. Build your wealth through various methods like mining, adventuring, alchemy, and restaurant management, while adjusting your strategies based on the predictions of Oracles.

*Caution: Consulting Oracles may decrease your sanity level!

The fate of the world will be shaped by your decisions, and your staff may fall for you based on your choices. This game offers up to 23 different endings.

The Hotel

Making money is great!! Making money is joyful!!

What’s that, lose some sanity for the sake of earning money?

The Building

This dilapidated villa can be transformed into a luxurious hotel!

As a boss who’s ruthless to customers but kind to employees, you’ll customize rooms specifically for your core staff!

…Wait, why is Death sleeping in a pit?

The Beautiful Yard

Please ignore the man-eating plant.

Kindly expedite the excavation of the mine and forest.

Pay attention to every guest visiting the courtyard and listen to their Oracles to gain extraordinary powers, but be sure to manage your SAN value to avoid confronting the truth too soon.

If you see a giant cat covered in eyes, please ask the front desk for a sick leave note.

The Forest

Beyond the hotel lies an expansive forest.

With proper development, it can provide a variety of ingredients for your inn’s restaurant.

Food and Alchemy

Place some indescribable animals and plants in specific containers.

Chop finely.

Add some magical spices from foreign lands.

Incorporate some special minerals.

It is essential to keep the right temperature from the flames.

“Are you talking about alchemy or Eastern mystical culinary arts?”

“Both.”

Food

This game offers multiple strategies.

Managing food, for instance, helps you swiftly utilize materials and amass wealth.

Assist the guests in the yard, and in return you’ll receive diverse recipes from around the world.

The automatic listing feature simplifies tasks, while the lovely chef assists in preparing meals. However, you’ll need to transform into a cat and diligently explore the mountains and forests to supply her with an abundance of ingredients.

Alchemy

Stay on good terms with Yevna the Red Dragon, and she will faithfully supply you with alchemical products in the alchemy workshop.

By enhancing your alchemy skills, you can boost the workshop’s production.

Pprioritising collecting alchemical formulas will enabling you to craft exceptional items,

such as the legendary Philosopher’s Stone.

Recruit Employees

  • Little Leaf: Bioroid Maid – One day, you discovered she was once human (???).
  • Tlipoca: Trainee Death/ Front Desk Reception – After confessing, “I need to repay 9999 ounces of high-purity souls to the Death Tower,” she brandished her scythe. Will you choose to slaughter your guests to repay her debt?
  • Yevna: Red Dragon / Alchemist / Director of Operations – Don’t tell her that by the fifth month of your training, your alchemy skills surpassed hers; the proud red dragon will become angry.
  • Haa Lou Ling: Spirit Hunter / Chef – Although her swordsmanship is impressive, she prefers being a chef. Regardless, her knife skills are excellent.

In addition, there is a variety of unique NPCs with a wide range of different races, appearances, and personalities. Every character has their own story to discover.

A rich game experience and a fantastical dark world await your exploration.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/hotel-management-simulation-x-romance-visual-novel-yog-sothoths-yard-coming-to-switch-on-july-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Neverness to Everness PS5 pre-orders now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

Latest character trailer introduces Jiuyuan.

Pre-orders for free-to-play supernatural urban open-world action RPG Neverness to Everness are now available for PlayStation 5 via PlayStation Store, publisher Perfect World Games and developer Hotta Studio announced.

While the game is free-to-play, the $9.99 pre-order edition includes the following bonus items:

  • Fabricated Dice (x5)
  • De-noise Solution (x10)
  • Elite Hunter Guide (x10)
  • Chaotic Dye (x10)
  • Manhole Boss (x10)
  • Beetle Coin (x100,000)

Here is a brief overview of the game, via Perfect World Games:

Appraiser, welcome to Eibon Antique Shop.

As the Appraiser and a member of Eibon, you must have received your first commission. We’re sure you have questions about the job. It is true that Anomaly Hunters are often asked to help solve problems and deal with all sorts of anomalies, like “Mysties,” who are up to no good and preventing customers from getting hot pot, or “Ora Punchers,” who eagerly crave to fight passersby in a tournament.

Some even define “Anomaly Hunters” as those who take commissions related to anomalies. All these people can see, is that Anomaly Hunters are always running to their next commission. However, Appraiser, it’s up to you to find your own definition as you spend more time at Eibon.
One might say that the clients of this commission consist of everyone from Eibon.

Listen to the voice within, and move at your own pace as you take it all in. The city, with your trust, will in time reward you with days that are vibrant, colorful, and worth remembering.

Appraiser, wonderful encounters are waiting for you.

Neverness to Everness is due out for PlayStation 5, PC, iOS, and Android on April 23 in China and April 29 worldwide.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

PlayStation 5 Pre-Order Trailer

English

Japanese

Jiuyuan Character Trailer: Mission Accomplished

English

Japanese

Korean



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/neverness-to-everness-ps5-pre-orders-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds DLC ‘Mega Man Pack’ now available
item.content:encoded:
Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds downloadable content “Mega Man Pack” is now available for $5.99, SEGA announced. It is also available as part of the $29.99 Season Pass.

The pack includes the following content:

  • Mega Man and Proto Man as playable characters
  • Rush Roadstar vehicle
  • “Wily Castle” Course
  • New Mega Man-inspired music tracks:
    • “Wily Castle”
    • “Mega Man Character Select”
    • “Mega Man: Result”
  • Six different emotes per character

Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer and gameplay video below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC “Mega Man Pack” Launch Trailer

English

Japanese

Mega Man and Proto Man Gameplay

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/sonic-racing-crossworlds-dlc-mega-man-pack-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
